vBRIEFInfo.description: Add version/upgrade gate to deft/run entry point so CLI users see a warning after a framework update.

plan.title: feat(cli): add version/upgrade gate to deft/run entry point

narratives.Problem: After a consumer updates their deft submodule, there is no deterministic gate that detects the project needs migration. The sync skill only fires on explicit agent triggers; the consumer's `task check` is their own. `deft/run` is the only deterministic entry point directive controls that runs in consumer project context, so that is where the CLI gate belongs.
narratives.Action: Add a non-fatal upgrade gate in main() before subcommand dispatch. Write a vbrief/.deft-version marker on first setup (cmd_project) and on explicit `run upgrade`. On every invocation, compare the recorded version to VERSION; warn on drift. If no marker but legacy SPECIFICATION.md/PROJECT.md without the <!-- deft:deprecated-redirect --> sentinel are found, warn about pre-v0.20 state. Interactive sessions prompt 'continue anyway? [y/N]'; non-interactive sessions warn and continue so CI is never blocked. Skip the gate entirely when running inside the deft repo itself (detected by root main.md + missing ./deft/ subdir).
narratives.Constraint: Non-fatal; charter says 'warn + prompt; non-interactive: warn + continue; never fatal'.
narratives.Test: tests/cli/test_upgrade_gate.py -- marker helpers, legacy detection, deft-repo heuristic, gate behavior (silent on match, warns on drift, non-interactive continues, skip commands), cmd_upgrade happy path + idempotency + legacy warning.
narratives.Outcome: CLI users invoking `deft/run <command>` after updating the submodule see a clear warning directing them to `task migrate:vbrief` or `deft/run upgrade`. `run upgrade` records the current VERSION in vbrief/.deft-version so subsequent invocations are silent. The gate does not break CI (no TTY -> warn + continue).

items.title: Add _check_upgrade_gate orchestrator + wire into main() before dispatch
Add cmd_upgrade command + register in dispatcher + usage() entry
Write marker on successful cmd_project (greenfield first-setup)
Tests: version marker helpers, legacy detection, gate behavior, cmd_upgrade
